plot leaflet

Source: R/plot_leaflet.R
plot_leaflet.Rd

plot leaflet

Usage

plot_leaflet(g, lat, lon, col = "site", tile = "Default")

Arguments

g

igraph object

lat

vertex attribute that gives latitude

lon

vertex attribute that gives longitude

col

vertex attribute to give marker colour

tile

background tile

Value

leaflet plot

Examples

plot_leaflet(example_network, "lat", "long", col = "site")

On this page
